signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Locker room pep talks go a long way. Players with this ability can easily enter the Zone in the 2nd half.
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break the first tackle attempt on kick returns
Ballcarriers with this ability will replenish a portion of their stamina upon successfully performing any skill move
The best defenders are capable of dismantling an offense like they knew the playcall the whole time. When they enter the zone, they can see offensive play art via coach cam.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability allow fewer broken tackles and cause more fumbles when cut-sticking ballcarriers.
Defenders with this ability will frequently prevent additional yardage gains while tackling
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability gain blocker resistance points as a faster rate
Blockers with this ability defend against spin pass rush moves as if they had an additional resistance point
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break hit-stick tackle attempts made on them.
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.

signatureAbility.signatureActivationDescription: Make consecutive passes for 5+ yards in air
signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Accurate passers know that ball placement is the difference between a touchdown and a turnover. When they enter the zone, all passes are thrown with perfect accuracy.
While in the pocket, passers with this ability are almost guaranteed to evade the first sack attempt by a blitzing defensive back.
Midway through the fourth quarter in close games, players with this ability can easily enter (and remain in) the Zone.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on any high point throws under 20 yards.
Passers with this ability have faster passing animations when they are throwing under pressure
When playing from behind, players with this ability can easily enter the Zone.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability can reach out of engaged blocks to tackle or sack nearby ballcarriers.
